creator: obrien@Nuxi.cs.ucdavis.edu
text:
The a2ps and psutils ports assume the A4 paper size.  This can be a
	gotcha to U.S. users.  At first I figured there was something
	wrong with my printer setup.

Fix: 

So I would like to request that the psutils port be renamed to
	psutils-a4, and a2ps be renamed a2ps-a4.

	I will be submitting suitable a2ps-us and psutils-us portballs.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd a2p; make; make install
	a2ps foo | lpr -P ps
